arts.ttl: Thigh injury scuppered Tottenham exit in January – Negotiations were ‘well advanced’
arts.sum: In the winter transfer window, the Italian press was confident about Napoli’s interest in Tottenham’s Timo Werner. There was a suggestion that the Italian side made contact for the German and wanted to understand the forward’s situation after losing Khvicha Kvaratskhelia to Paris Saint-Germain. arts.ttl: Tottenham and Chelsea lined up for €40-50m transfer tussle – Both willing to pay up
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur and Chelsea are in the picture to sign AFC Bournemouth’s Antoine Semenyo, according to Area Napoli. The winger has starred for the Cherries this season, managing nine goals and five assists 31 games. Last week, TuttoMercatoWeb reported Napoli are looking at Semenyo, who they thought was valued at €30m by Bournemouth. Alasdair Gold Shares Worrying Tottenham Injury Blow on Star
arts.sum: Alasdair Gold has confirmed that Tottenham defender Kevin Danso is set for a spell on the sidelines after picking up an injury against Bournemouth.

arts.ttl: 'Crazy': Thierry Henry says manager Spurs reportedly want if Ange Postecoglou gets sacked is just 'outstanding'
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur could be on the hunt for a new manager for next season. Ange Postecoglou has had to go through a lot of problems...

arts.ttl: Heung-Min Son ahead of Europa League decider with AZ Alkmaar
arts.sum: As we prepare for an undoubtedly huge night at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium this week as we host AZ Alkmaar in the deciding leg of our UEFA Europa League round of 16 tie, Sonny is well aware we will need to bring much more than our quality to the game if we are going to progress. Our attitude and desire will be fundamental.

arts.ttl: Howard Webb gives Erling Haaland Tottenham vs Man City handball verdict as VAR audio released
arts.sum: VAR: Checking the on-field decision to disallow the goal for an accidental handball. "We know from the way the law is written that if this ball touches Erling Haaland's arm, then the goal has to be disallowed because he scores immediately.
